London, United Kingdom

ProLuxe Bureau

Run a 200-person hotel programme without chasing 200 people.

Bureau is the console we built for our office. Each delegate gets a personal link, confirms their own room, and the status updates live. You see the programme, not the inbox.

01 / Delegates confirm their own rooms.

Delegates confirm their own rooms.

Each guest receives a personal link, picks dates and preferences, confirms in under 2 minutes. No account creation, no app download. You stop chasing.

02 / Rooms held until the deadline.

Rooms held until the deadline.

Daily inventory holds protect your block. Unconfirmed rooms release on a schedule you set, not a hotel surprise. No more 6pm scrambles the day before.

03 / One status view across every delegate.

One status view across every delegate.

Confirmed, pending, dropped. Filter by hotel, by date, by guest. Export the rooming list when you need it. The hotel works from the same record you do.

How it works for a programme

We configure Bureau before your event opens. Rooming categories, daily holds, hotel contracts, all reflecting what we have already negotiated. From there, every delegate sits in one programme view.

You send each delegate their personal link. They confirm. The dashboard updates. If someone needs a hand, you adjust their booking in 2 clicks, or pass it back to us with one.

bureau.proluxetravels.com/programmes/[programme]/rooming

Hands-on, or hands-off

Some bookers run the programme themselves through Bureau, sending the personal links, adjusting bookings in place, exporting the rooming list when they need it. Others send us the rooming list and monitor the dashboard as we work through it. Same console, same audit trail. Your call.

When the deadline matters

Daily inventory hold is set when we configure the programme. Rooms stay held against your block until the date you set. After that, unconfirmed rooms release back to the hotel on a schedule, not a phone call.

You see the count drop in real time. The hotel sees the same. No reconciling, no late surprises.

bureau.proluxetravels.com/programmes/[programme]/inventory
Hotel A
Berlin
Held
80
rooms held
200 total programme
Release schedule
Held
Releasing 10/day from 12 Aug
Released
Held until 12 Aug 2026, then 10 rooms release per day to 20 Aug 2026.

The escape valve

Same record, same handoff. If a booking needs us, a complex amendment, a last-minute relocation, a payment question, pass it back. We pick it up, the audit log shows the handoff, and you carry on with the next 50 delegates.

If you are running a programme of 50 or more delegates in 2026, we should talk. We take a small number of new programmes per quarter.

Speak with us
ProLuxe Travel

Corporate & luxury travel management.
